title: Kubernetes HPA Deep Dive: Scaling Beyond CPU
description: A practical guide to Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler, covering CPU, memory, and custom metrics scaling with real examples.

title: Terraform State Management Patterns That Actually Work
description: How to structure Terraform state for multi-environment, multi-team projects without losing your mind.

title: Building a Production CI/CD Pipeline with GitHub Actions
description: A step-by-step guide to building a robust CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions that handles testing, building, and deploying.

title: PostgreSQL Query Optimization: From Slow to Sub-Millisecond
description: Practical techniques for optimizing PostgreSQL queries, understanding EXPLAIN plans, and choosing the right indexes.

title: Container Networking Demystified: Bridges, Overlays, and CNI
description: Understanding how containers talk to each other, from Linux bridges to Kubernetes CNI plugins.

title: Prometheus and Grafana: Building Observability from Scratch
description: A hands-on guide to setting up Prometheus and Grafana for monitoring your infrastructure and applications.

title: GitOps with ArgoCD: Declarative Deployments Done Right
description: How to implement GitOps workflows using ArgoCD for Kubernetes deployments with automatic sync and rollbacks.

title: Linux Cgroups and Namespaces: The Foundation of Containers
description: Understanding the Linux primitives that make containers possible, with hands-on examples.

title: API Rate Limiting Patterns: Token Buckets, Sliding Windows, and Beyond
description: How to implement effective rate limiting for your APIs using different algorithms and when to use each.

title: Docker Multi-Stage Builds: Shrinking Images the Right Way
description: A practical guide to using multi-stage Docker builds to create minimal, secure production images.

title: Nginx as a Reverse Proxy: The Complete Practical Guide
description: Everything you need to know about using Nginx as a reverse proxy, from basic proxying to load balancing and TLS termination.

title: Database Migration Strategies for Zero-Downtime Deployments
description: How to run schema migrations without taking your application offline, covering expand-contract patterns and feature flags.

title: Kubernetes RBAC: Locking Down Your Cluster Without Locking Out Your Team
description: A practical approach to Kubernetes Role-Based Access Control that balances security with developer productivity.

title: Redis Caching Patterns for Backend Engineers
description: Cache-aside, write-through, write-behind, and other Redis caching patterns with practical implementation examples.

title: Writing Helm Charts from Scratch: A Practical Walkthrough
description: How to create, template, and manage Helm charts for Kubernetes deployments with real-world patterns.

title: gRPC vs REST: When to Use Which and Why
description: A practical comparison of gRPC and REST APIs, covering performance, developer experience, and real-world trade-offs.

title: HashiCorp Vault for Secrets Management: A Getting Started Guide
description: How to set up and use HashiCorp Vault to manage secrets, with Docker Compose examples and application integration.

title: Building a Logging Pipeline with OpenSearch and Fluent Bit
description: A hands-on guide to centralized logging using OpenSearch and Fluent Bit, from collection to dashboards.

title: Designing Reliable Webhooks: Retries, Signatures, and Idempotency
description: How to build webhook systems that are reliable, secure, and debuggable, from both producer and consumer perspectives.

title: Systemd for Application Deployments: Beyond the Basics
description: Using systemd to manage long-running services, with unit files, resource limits, and automatic restarts.
